name: Farcent Enterprise Co., Ltd
summary: Farcent Enterprise Co., Ltd provides consumer products in Taiwan and internationally. It offers deodorants; personal care products, including perfumes; dehumidifiers; home cleaning lotions, such as bath and toilet cleaners, floor cleaners, pipe dredging glue and agents, and cleaning tablets; natural cleaning lotions, including dishwashing liquids, laundry detergents, floor cleaners, laundry tank detergents, and hand washing mousse; home cleaning tools comprising mops, dedusting papers, rags, and cleaning bags; and mosquito repellent products. It offers its products through supermarkets, cosmetic shops, convenient stores, chain stores, and agents, as well as online. The company was formerly known as Eutech Enterprise Co., Ltd and changed its name to Farcent Enterprise Co., Ltd in 1996. Farcent Enterprise Co., Ltd was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
